raw_consumer_statement:
Macys credit card company has not adequately addressed nor credited back to our account the fraudulent charges placed onto our card from a card theft fraud which occurred in XX/XX/XXXX. We discovered the fraudulent charges on XX/XX/XXXX and cancelled our card. We have made 3 requests over the past XXXX  months to have charges corrected, but Macys has been unable to credit back the fraudulent charges. Our acct is overdrawn by about XXXX XXXX  ( has never occurred in the history of us having the card prior to fraud ), our credit is being adversely affected and we are still having to pay a monthly amount based on erroneous charges. 

When we first filed the dispute, the statement and Macys representative both indicated a refund in the amount of over XXXX XXXX ( XX/XX/XXXX statement provided in attachments ). However, later statements now indicate we owe them over $ XXXX. The math is incorrect and XXXX. We should not have to pay for a debt that we did not create. We are the victims of fraud.
